description: Coordinator dispatched DWL-T2 (ADR-0041 schema field deletion) to lead-schema as a fresh refactor, but on inspection the deletion was already complete on main: 0 commits ahead of main, zero schema.ts files, zero AdapterSchema or .schema.parse hits in src/, all six ADR-0041 steps verified done, 2906/0 tests passing, lint clean, project src/ typecheck clean. The dispatch text was written from the ADR alone without first running the readiness probe against the current branch.
resolution: Lead must verify prerequisite/already-done state before spawning workers. Run rg/grep for the deletion targets, confirm git log main..HEAD has commits if the work was supposed to be incremental, and if the work is already shipped escalate to coordinator with --type status (not --type error — error implies blocker, status implies coordination correction) and explain. Do not spawn a builder to redo work; a no-op commit wastes a turn and a misread spec risks accidentally re-introducing deleted code.
